import { useState } from 'react' import { useTheme } from '../../context/landing/ThemeContext' import { useModal } from '../../context/landing/ModalContext' const SunIcon = () => ( ) const MoonIcon = () => ( ) const WrenchIcon = () => ( ) export default function Navbar() { const { theme, toggle } = useTheme() const { openModal } = useModal() const [mobileOpen, setMobileOpen] = useState(false) const closeMobile = () => { setMobileOpen(false) document.body.style.overflow = '' } const toggleMobile = () => { const next = !mobileOpen setMobileOpen(next) document.body.style.overflow = next ? 'hidden' : '' } return ( <>
